package.missing: Laravel API Generator package is not installed in this project.
package.scrambleMissing: Scramble (dedoc/scramble) is not installed. It is required to generate API documentation.
package.scrambleNotInstalled: Scramble is not installed. Please install it first.
package.sanctumMissing: Auth option requires Laravel Sanctum (laravel/sanctum) which is not installed in this project.
package.sanctumInstallStarted: Sanctum installation started. Re-run generation once it completes.

env.missing: .env file not found in this project. Database commands will fail without it.
env.createdFromExample: .env created from .env.example. Review your DB credentials before running migrations.
env.dbImportCancelled: Database introspection cancelled: .env file is required.

stubs.alreadyPublished: Stubs are already published. What do you want to do?

stubs.publishedDone: Stubs published to stubs/vendor/laravel-api-generator/. You can now edit them freely.
